name: Of Humans and Dragons: Stormcutter
description:
"This wasn't a vicious beast, but an intelligent, gentle creature, whose soul reflected my own."

Welp. Looks like I've made a new series of bots! granted I don't plan on doing EVERY dragon from HTTYD but there are a good few that I want to make bots of (list will be made once I finish this series so I don't have to keep updating every single bot as I put out more). Also her personality is based off of Stormjumper from HTTYD2

As is the usual I try to do with these bots I have 2 scenarios:
1) Viking times
2) Modern day

Much like with the last 2 bots in this series I have tried to express to the bot that this character does NOT have hands but you may need to edit or reload messages, she can't speak at first but can be taught how to speak. Additionally bot should be described similarly to the images.

She should be able to rotate her head 180 degrees like and owl and her fire breath should come out like a fire tornado.

As always please leave any feedback on the bot in the comments! \^0^/

Art made by AC Hunter on Twitter
